ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., natural, synthetic) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the image */,
  "image_source" TEXT /* Source of the image (e.g., dataset, user upload) */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail version of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the layer belongs to */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of layer (e.g., RGB, grayscale) */,
  "layer_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the layer */,
  "layer_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the layer */,
  "layer_source" TEXT /* Source of the layer (e.g., original, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_layers_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer the feature belongs to */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the layer */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the layer */,
  "contrast" REAL /* Contrast of the layer */,
  "idm" REAL /* Inverse difference moment of the layer */,
  "autocorrelation" REAL /* Autocorrelation of the layer */,
  "mean_x" REAL /* Mean of the layer in the x-direction */,
  "mean_y" REAL /* Mean of the layer in the y-direction */,
  "variance_x" REAL /* Variance of the layer in the x-direction */,
  "variance_y" REAL /* Variance of the layer in the y-direction */,
  "standard_deviation_x" REAL /* Standard deviation of the layer in the x-direction */,
  "standard_deviation_y" REAL /* Standard deviation of the layer in the y-direction */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation of the layer */,
  "dissimilarity" REAL /* Dissimilarity of the layer */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the feature */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source of the feature (e.g., algorithm, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_features_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES image_layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_techniques" (
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technique */,
  "technique_name" TEXT /* Name of the technique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technique */,
  "technique_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the technique */,
  "technique_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the technique */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being processed */,
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technique used for processing */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was processed */,
  "processing_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the processing event */,
  "processing_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the processing */,
  "processing_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_technique_id FOREIGN KEY ("technique_id") REFERENCES image_processing_techniques ("technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the access event */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_features_versions" (
  "version_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version feature */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "version_feature_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version feature */,
  "version_feature_source" TEXT /* Source of the version feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_features_versions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES image_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_features_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES image_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_versions" (
  "version_processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version processing event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being processed */,
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processing event */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was processed */,
  "version_processing_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version processing event */,
  "version_processing_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the version processing */,
  "version_processing_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES image_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_versions_processing_id FOREIGN KEY ("processing_id") REFERENCES image_processing ("processing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_access_versions" (
  "version_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version access event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being accessed */,
  "access_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "version_access_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version access event */,
  "version_access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the version access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES image_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_versions_access_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_id") REFERENCES image_access ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_layers_versions" (
  "version_layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version layer */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the layer belongs to */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of layer (e.g., RGB, grayscale) */,
  "version_layer_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version layer */,
  "version_layer_source" TEXT /* Source of the version layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_layers_versions_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES image_layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_layers_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES image_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_features_versions_layers" (
  "version_feature_layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version feature layer */,
  "version_layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version layer the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "version_feature_layer_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version feature layer */,
  "version_feature_layer_source" TEXT /* Source of the version feature layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_feature_layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_features_versions_layers_version_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_layer_id") REFERENCES image_layers_versions ("version_layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_features_versions_layers_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES image_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_versions_layers" (
  "version_processing_layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version processing layer event */,
  "version_layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version layer being processed */,
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processing event */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the version layer was processed */,
  "version_processing_layer_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version processing layer event */,
  "version_processing_layer_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the version processing layer */,
  "version_processing_layer_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_processing_layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_versions_layers_processing_id FOREIGN KEY ("processing_id") REFERENCES image_processing ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_versions_layers_version_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_layer_id") REFERENCES image_layers_versions ("version_layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_access_versions_layers" (
  "version_access_layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version access layer event */,
  "version_layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version layer being accessed */,
  "access_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the version layer was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "version_access_layer_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the version access layer event */,
  "version_access_layer_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the version access layer was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_access_layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_versions_layers_version_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_layer_id") REFERENCES image_layers_versions ("version_layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_versions_layers_access_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_id") REFERENCES image_access ("access_id")
)
